title: Return of Steel Production Growth Ex-China Continues
section_path: Return of Steel Production Growth Ex-China Continues
section_path_text: Return of Steel Production Growth Ex-China Continues
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, global steel production totaled approximately 141.8 million tons in September. This is down month-on-month by 3.5 million tons (-2%) and is down year-on-year by 1.8 million tons (-1%). Steel production outside of China totaled approximately 68.3 million tons.
